productDisplayName: Lotus Herbals Natural Blend Comfort Liquid Buff Foundation 320
description: Liquid foundation with SPF 20 which provides an oil free, lightweight and matte finish comfortable make-up for a flawless look, contains jojoba and soy lecithin which moisturises and softens the skin and grape seed extract which acts as an anti-microbial and antioxidant, natural astringent, for oily skin
